hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */wailsjs/*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not edit generated wailsjs bindings. Edit the Go backend and run wails generate module instead."}'; exit 0 ;; */go.sum|*/package-lock.json) echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Do not edit $(basename "$f") directly. Use go mod tidy or npm install instead.\"}"; exit 0 ;; esac; }

cd /Volumes/git/luxury-yacht/app && jq -n --arg branch "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" --arg diff "$(git diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null | tail -5)" --arg log "$(git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null)" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreCompact",additionalContext:("--- Pre-compact context snapshot ---
Branch: "+$branch+"
Uncommitted changes:
"+$diff+"
Recent commits:
"+$log+"
--- End snapshot ---")}}'

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.go) goimports -w "$f" ;; */frontend/src/*.ts|*/frontend/src/*.tsx|*/frontend/src/*.css|*/frontend/src/*.json) cd /Volumes/git/luxury-yacht/app/frontend && npx prettier --write "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
